I am writing regarding a serious issue with my 2024 Audi Q5, which I purchased brand new and have owned for only 12 months. The vehicle has developed premature rotor wear, which is entirely unexpected given its age, my normal driving habits, and Audi’s reputation for quality.

narrative.headline: What 2024 Audi Q5 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 18 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Forward Collision Avoidance (61% of reports).
